name: libfreezethaw-perl
title: libfreezethaw-perl
summary: module to serialize and deserialize Perl data structures
description:
module to serialize and deserialize Perl data structures
FreezeThaw is a Perl module designed to convert data to and from a serialized
string format, appropriate for saving to and reading from permanent storage.
It is capable of dealing with objects, circular lists and repeated appearance
of the same reference.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfreezethaw-perl because module to serialize and deserialize Perl data structures.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfreezethaw-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfreezethaw-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfreezethaw-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
